name: Jayant Agro-Organics Limited
summary: Jayant Agro-Organics Limited manufactures and trades in castor oil and its derivatives worldwide. It operates through three segments: Castor Oil, Derivatives, and Power Generation. The company offers blown, dehydrated, hydrogenated, and ethoxylated castor oils; and 12-hydroxy stearic acid, castor meal, glycerine, jagrolube, sebacic acid, 2-octanone, HIOL fatty acid, jagropol, and ricinoleic acid. It provides castor oil and its derivatives for applications in agriculture, cosmetics, electronics, lubricants, paint, perfumeries, pharma, polymers and plastics, rubber, and textiles industries. Jayant Agro-Organics Limited also engages in the power generation business. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Mumbai, India. Jayant Agro-Organics Limited is a subsidiary of Jayant Finvest Limited.
